meaning: n.大牧场(或大农场)工人住的棚屋
examples: Shiva Moradfar of Rancho Santa Fe believes her home escaped the fire.
We settled on El Rancho Original, the first locale that opened on the highway.
Madeline Redstone, sister-in-law of media mogul Sumner Redstone, has put her Rancho Mirage, Calif.
One day, a convoy of three gleaming new pickup trucks appeared at the rancho.
